[21:27:22 INF] --- PrivatePdfConverter v1.3.1 (commit: e9a15f46961ecdf0f30a85f99c246aa01f02ca44) ---
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  dir        Convert all images in the specified path into a single PDF file.
  encrypt    Encrypt a PDF file using the provided password.
  ext        Lists valid image extensions
  img        Convert a single image file to a PDF.
  logo       Add a logo/image watermark to every page of the given PDF.
  merge      Merge all PDF files in the specified path into a single PDF file.

result.stdout:
[21:27:22 INF] --- PrivatePdfConverter v1.3.1 (commit: e9a15f46961ecdf0f30a85f99c246aa01f02ca44) ---
Usage: logo [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Add a logo/image watermark to every page of the given PDF.

Options:
  --path <string>         Path to the source PDF file. [Required]
  --logo-path <string>    Path to the logo/image file to stamp. [Required]
  --position <string>     One of: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right. [Required]
  --scale <int?>          Optional scale percentage (e.g. 25 for 25%). [Required]
  --opacity <int?>        Optional opacity percentage (0-100). [Required]
  --output <string?>      Optional output file name (without extension). [Required]
